channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pixel Watch 5 leak shows off four different finishes
item.description: A new leak may have just spoiled the Pixel Watch 5 and its finishes ahead of Google's launch event next month. Leaked press renders provided to The Tide Chart by OnLeaks appear to show the upcoming watch with four case finishes: black (Dark Anthracite), polished silver (Natural Silver), yellow gold (Warm Gold), and a duskier […]

item.title: VPN firms and digital rights groups join forces to urge the UK government to leave VPNs alone
item.description: A coalition of over 20 digital rights groups and tech firms, including Amnesty International, NordVPN, and Mozilla, warns that plans to age-gate or restrict VPNs will severely compromise national cybersecurity while doing little to keep children safe.

item.title: What's the difference between active noise canceling and passive?
item.description: The frustrating science of keeping your ears from doing their job.

item.title: Waze devient « moins bavard » pour votre confort et se dope à Gemini
item.description: Waze empile les fonctions dopées à l'IA : navigation qui apprend vos habitudes, recherche vocale propulsée par Gemini et un mode pour enfin parler moins. Le tout se déploie cette semaine.

item.title: Apples iOS 27 public beta: Here are 8 features you should try right now
item.description: Apple has launched the public beta of iOS 27 ahead of its September release. Here are the best features you should try right now.

item.title: I’m a computer expert, and I recommend jumping on this nearly half-price 1TB WD_BLACK SN7100 NVMe SSD while it's still under $190
item.description: Save 49% off the 1TB WD_BLACK SN7100 SSD, a high-speed PCIe Gen4 drive with read speeds of up to 7,250 MB/s.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix de ce climatiseur portable 3-en-1 Dreame, pile au bon moment
item.description: Le Dreame P-Wind10 est un climatiseur portable 3-en-1 capable de refroidir, déshumidifier et ventiler des pièces jusqu'à 25 m². Il est en ce moment proposé à 319 euros au lieu de 359 euros sur Amazon, avec une remise de 11 %.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Tour de France online for free
item.description: How to watch the Tour de France for free. Live stream the 2026 Tour de France for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: HP's LaserJet Pro 4000 Series is 'one of the fastest laser printers' in its class with blistering 42ppm speeds — and it just got a major price cut
item.description: A dependable mono laser printer built for high-volume printing with expandable paper capacity and reliable networking in busy offices.

item.title: OnePlus devrait bientôt disparaître du marché en Europe
item.description: Oppo devrait bientôt annoncer officiellement le retrait de OnePlus des marchés européens et américains. Cependant, pas de panique si vous disposez d’un appareil de la marque.

item.title: EverQuest’s biggest fans are leading its revival
item.description: Live-service games and the companies that run them are in big trouble. Games and their developers are getting shut down and gutted, and publishers' huge promises are dubious. Meanwhile, EverQuest, one of the original live-service games, is thundering back more than 25 years later. EverQuest Legends is currently in preorder beta with an upcoming release […]...

item.title: 'Talk to Spotify' lets you create playlists and learn about songs with voice commands
item.description: Spotify is finally letting users control the app with their voice to create playlists or learn about songs.

item.title: 1Password moves into AI cost management, betting that token spend is the next enterprise budget crisis
item.description: 1Password on Tuesday launched AI Spend and Consumption Management, a new capability embedded in its SaaS Manager platform that gives IT and finance teams a unified, real-time view of how their organizations consume and spend on AI services from vendors including Anthropic, Cursor, and OpenAI.The move marks the latest strategic expansion for a company that built its reputation on password management for consumers and, over the past three years, has aggressively repositioned itself as a broader identity security and SaaS governance platform for enterprise buyers. With this release, 1Password is ...

item.title: Canva launches Code 2.0, offering AI website building to every user — including free accounts
item.description: Canva on Tuesday launched Canva Code 2.0, a major upgrade to its AI-powered coding tool that lets users build interactive websites, apps, and experiences using plain-language prompts — and then edit the results as easily as tweaking a Canva presentation. The feature is now available to all of the company's more than 265 million monthly users across every pricing tier, including free accounts.The move is Canva's most aggressive push yet into the fast-growing "vibe coding" market, a category that barely existed 18 months ago but has already minted billion-dollar startups and reshaped how non-dev...

item.title: Reportage dans les usines de Shokz en Chine : silicone maison, tortures méthodiques et cartographie mondiale des oreilles
item.description: Sa propre usine de silicone, une chaîne d’assemblage confiée à Luxshare, partenaire des plus grands noms de la tech mondiale et un labo de tests qui torture ses écouteurs. Shokz nous a ouvert les coulisses de son étonnant appareil industriel à Shenzhen, en Chine. Plongée dans les rouages d'une firme qui a démocratisé la conduction osseuse, qui domine depuis trois ans le marché des écouteurs ouverts et qui assume désormais vouloir un jour « détrôner les AirPods ». ...

item.title: Thought smart glasses were creepy? These bone conduction headphones have a tiny 4K camera — but luckily they're aimed at cyclists
item.description: The W&O X1 put a recording camera right by your ear, which is great for action cam videos but worrying for privacy.

item.title: 'Removing discs doesn’t represent progress – it simply removes choice' — The Entertainment Retailers Association denounces Sony's decision to kill physical discs
item.description: UK trade organization, Entertainment Retailers Association (ERA), has criticized Sony's decision to end production of physical PlayStation discs.

item.title: C’est le grand déstockage chez la Fnac et Darty : voici les 12 meilleures offres à saisir avant la fin des soldes
item.description: Les soldes d’été entrent dans leur dernière semaine et la Fnac comme Darty ont décidé de vider définitivement leurs stocks ! C’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fermeture des rayons promotionnels. Pour vous faire gagner du temps, nous avons sélectionné les dernières offres qui valent vraiment le coup avant la fin.

item.title: Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger update: Stock prices react as 12 states sue to stop deal
item.description: The Hollywood mega-merger has hit a stumbling block after being approved by shareholders and the DOJ, but investors appear to be shrugging off the news. There’s no shortage of drama when it comes to the largest merger in Hollywood history. Earlier this year, Netflix dropped out of its bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) after Paramount Skydance made an offer that was more attractive to WBD shareholders. ...

item.title: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : voici les ultimes offres à saisir
item.description: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : c’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fin ! Il ne vous reste plus qu'une semaine pour en profiter et renouveler votre équipement (smartphones, TV, PC portables, tablettes, objets connectés…). On continue de faire le tri pour vous proposer en temps réel les meilleures pépites Tech que l'on voit passer. ...

item.title: Black Ops 7 Season 5 has been fully revealed, with the next Call of Duty update bringing a raft of fresh content
item.description: Black Ops 7 is about to get its next big update with loads of new weapons and a handful of maps.

item.title: Unlucky Redditor orders Corsair DDR5 RAM from Amazon and gets sent dummy light sticks instead — but one trick saves their skin
item.description: A Reddit user got scammed when buying RAM off Amazon, but one clever step helped them get a refund.

item.title: Former Rockstar producer jokes he's 'pretty happy' he's not working on GTA 6 because of how 'monstrous' it seems — 'Every single time they do a GTA, it's like ludicrously bigger than before'
item.description: Former Rockstar Games producer John Ricchio believes Grand Theft Auto 6 will be a massive game and is glad he isn't working on such an ambitious project.

item.title: Darty brade l’enceinte parfaite pour s’ambiancer tout l’été : la JBL Flip 7 édition Tomorrowland à -33 %
item.description: Profitez des soldes d'été pour vous offrir la JBL Flip 7 ! Darty propose une offre particulièrement alléchante sur l'édition limitée Tomorrowland de cette célèbre enceinte Bluetooth cylindrique. Elle se négocie à seulement 99 euros au lieu de 149 euros habituellement.

item.title: How to try the Siri AI beta: Join the waitlist
item.description: Apple will release iOS 27, macOS 27 Golden Gate, and its other software updates in the fall, alongside Siri AI. Learn how to sign up for early access.

item.title: Windows 11 corrige enfin l’un de ses défauts les plus agaçants
item.description: Après des années de plaintes, Microsoft annonce enfin la suppression des contenus promotionnels de la barre de recherche de Windows 11 pour afficher uniquement des résultats pertinents.

item.title: Plex Keeps Getting Worse. Is Jellyfin a Decent Replacement?
item.description: If you want to stream local media, this free and open source media server is just as good as Plex. But if you rely on remote access or live TV, prepare to tinker.

item.title: Delivering on time is harder than companies admit
item.description: The industry doesn’t celebrate delivery consistency like it celebrates innovation but that doesn’t mean it’s not a valuable achievement. I’m genuinely proud when we commit to something at the start of the month and deliver by the deadline.

item.title: How to watch 2026 FIFA World Cup in Singapore: free live streams
item.description: All the ways to watch the FIFA World Cup 2026 live streams online in Singapore, including FREE options.

item.title: 'We love this... except gradual rollouts': Windows 11 search is being improved in a big way, with users impatient to get these changes — and I don't blame them
item.description: The search box is being improved across the board, and Microsoft is pleasing the computing crowd once again.
